title: SENTRY + PSID-8: spatiotemporal incident detection and benchmark toolkit
description: Reference implementation of the SENTRY architecture (a single-stage detector with a temporal feature memory and motion-conditioned attention) and the PSID-8 toolkit for annotating and evaluating physical-security incidents in surveillance video. Accompanies the paper 'Towards Physical Security Incident Detection in Video Surveillance: The SENTRY Architecture and the Data Gap'.

creators.name: Pena, Salomão Bento Nilo Pena
creators.affiliation: Instituto Superior de Ciências da Educação da Huíla; Federal University of Uberlândia
